name: strava-run-coach
description: Marketplace for the strava-run-coach plugin: an AI-native, stdlib-only running coach with Strava MCP ingestion, VDOT forecasts, fitness tracking, and plan generation.

plugins.name: strava-run-coach
plugins.description: AI-native running coach: Strava MCP ingestion, Daniels VDOT race forecasts, CTL/ATL/TSB fitness tracking, periodized plan generation with calendar export, and weekly plan-compliance reviews. Zero dependencies - the whole engine is Python stdlib.
